exampleContent.sectionSubtitle: Real prompts and articles from this template

prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your workforce reentry forward
items: Conduct a comprehensive skills inventory by listing all your professional skills, experiences, and qualifications from the past 10 years
Research current industry trends and job market conditions in your target field by reading 5 recent industry reports or articles
Create a professional development plan by identifying 3 specific skills or certifications you need to update or acquire for your target role
Audit and update your professional online presence by reviewing and refreshing your LinkedIn profile, cleaning up social media accounts, and checking your Google search results
Research and compile a list of 10 companies in your target industry that align with your values and career goals
Identify and document any employment gaps by creating a clear explanation for time away from work and practicing how to discuss it positively in interviews
